description_long: This is a male construction worker figure with short, curly blond hair, wearing a light blue button-up shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the elbows. He is dressed in black work pants secured with a black belt and is wearing black work boots. The figure has a blue visor or headband covering the upper part of his face, but no safety helmet or reflective vest is present. His hands are relaxed and open at his sides, and his posture is upright and neutral. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for an urban work environment but lacking some standard safety gear.
description: A male construction worker in a light blue shirt, black pants, and black work boots, with a blue visor and no helmet or vest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the light blue shirt, blue visor, black pants, and boots, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rolled-up sleeves, the profile of the blue visor, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, pants, and boots, with the hair and shirt collar visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the visor, shirt, and boots.
